Business: Lokesh Machines Limited manufactures and sells machine tools in India. The company operates through the Machines Division and Component Division segments. It offers CNC machines, including CNC turning centers, vertical and horizontal machining centers, drill and tap centers, turn mill centers, and vertical turning lathes. The company also provides …

  Current: 15.57  (-1.52% vs prior)
  India impact: High VIX → risk-off, FII sell EMs including India; low VIX → risk-on, inflows

  Current: 4.47 %
  India impact: Rising US 10Y → India bonds less attractive, FII debt outflows; falling → inflows
